description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display area framed by a moderately thick bezel. The bezel is uniform in width and has a matte black finish, giving the monitor a modern and understated appearance. The monitor is supported by a wide, circular pedestal stand that provides stability and is also finished in matte black. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding, and the side profile reveals a slim display panel that tapers slightly towards the edges. There are no visible physical buttons or controls on the front, sides, or base of the monitor. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no decorative elements.
description: A matte black flat-panel computer monitor with a thick bezel and a wide, circular pedestal stand. The design is minimalistic and modern, with no visible buttons or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular display framed by a thick, matte black bezel and the circular pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the monitor and the round base, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back panel and the circular stand, with no visible branding or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin profile and round base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, uniform in width, and has a matte black finish with sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, circular pedestal base made of matte black plastic or metal, providing stable support with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or base of the monitor.
